T

TAHOMA - Static variable in interface org.docgene.api.FontFace
"Tahoma".
text - Variable in class org.docgene.model.AbstractAPI
The API text.
text - Variable in class org.docgene.model.AbstractWikiLink
The link text.
TIMES_NEW_ROMAN - Static variable in interface org.docgene.api.FontFace
"Times New Roman".
TitledElement - Interface in org.docgene.model
Represent a titled element (chapter of title).
TitleOrIncludeElement - Interface in org.docgene.model
A tagging interface which is used for titles and include elements.
TOC_CHAPTER - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"toc": The title for the TOC_CHAPTER chapter.
TodoElement - Interface in org.docgene.model
A TODO element.

TREBUCHET - Static variable in interface org.docgene.api.FontFace
"Trebuchet MS".
TreeElement - Interface in org.docgene.model
Represent any element which can be included in a tree.
TRUE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.BorderType
The type with a simple line for the border.
type - Variable in class org.docgene.api.SentenceStyle
The font type. it is a OR of the enumeration values in the FontType interface.
TYPE_ARTICLE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a regular article.
TYPE_CLASS - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLJavaAPI
The default type, for class declarations.
TYPE_DATE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLDate
The date type.
TYPE_DATE_TIME - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLDate
The date and time type.
TYPE_DISAMB - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a disambiguation article.
TYPE_FALLBACK - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a fallback article.
TYPE_INDEX - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for the index article.
TYPE_MODULE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLJavaAPI
The type for module declarations.
TYPE_NONE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement
"none": Represents elements with no type.
TYPE_PACKAGE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLJavaAPI
The type for package declarations.
TYPE_RAW_HTML - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a raw html article.
TYPE_REDIRECT - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a redirect article.
TYPE_TEMPLATE - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.Article
The type for a template article.
TYPE_TIME - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLDate
The time type.
TYPE_UNDEFINED - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLDate
The undefined type.
